summary_one_line: ICC profile colorspace signatures at offsets 0x10-0x16 must be 'Lab '/'Lab ' (matching PCS), not the seeds' 'RGB '/'XYZ '.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The ICC profile header data/PCS colorspace-signature fields at byte offsets 0x10-0x12 and 0x14-0x16 must hold the literal four-char tags 'Lab ' / 'Lab ' (or another self-consistent pair like the 'link'/'lams' devicelink variant) rather than the default seed 'RGB ' / 'XYZ ', so that profile parsing drives cmsCreateExtendedTransform down a code path where AllocEmptyTransform(...) returns NULL and the blocked true branch at line 1182 is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every winner-resolving seed carries 'Lab ' at 0x10-0x16 (4c 61 62 .. 4c 61 62), and the W-only coverage of lines 1183-1184 plus the L1182 divergence T=20 (W) vs T=0 (L) shows the winner alone reaches the xform==NULL true branch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Every loser-blocking seed has 'RGB ' at 0x10-0x12 and 'XYZ ' at 0x14-0x16, never the matching 'Lab '/'Lab ' pair, so it stays on the false branch (L1182 L(T/F): T=0 F=60) and the true branch remains blocked across all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc's I2SRandReplace reads the post-execution CmpLogObserver buffer where lcms's four-char colorspace-signature comparisons logged the expected 'Lab ' operand, then substitutes those exact 4-byte tags into the input at the offsets where the old 'RGB '/'XYZ ' bytes appeared; naive and value_profile lack I2SRandReplace and cannot place these magic four-char tags by chance, so they never satisfy the colorspace gate.

evidence_trail.claim: Both decisive pairs differ only by the I2S technique (cmplog>naive and value_profile_cmplog>value_profile).
The second decisive pair adds I2S to a value_profile baseline.
The blocked side is the true branch of the xform==NULL test at line 1182.
Winner-resolving seeds carry 'Lab ' at offsets 0x10-0x16 in the profile header.
Loser-blocking seeds carry 'RGB '/'XYZ ' at offsets 0x10-0x16 instead.
Offsets 0x10-0x16 fully differ between W (Lab/Lab) and L (RGB/XYZ).
Only the winner takes the true branch at line 1182 while the loser only takes the false branch.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1182  T=20 F=24  T=0 F=60  if (xform == NULL) {  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The winner-only coverage of the return path at lines 1183-1184 confirms the winner reaches the blocked true side.
I2SRandReplace substitutes one logged CMP operand into the input at byte offsets matching the other operand.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets

evidence_trail.claim: naive and value_profile lack the I2SRandReplace mutator.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2426 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 0aedfccd0898c3ff` and observed one I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 16 (ancestor 5441efb6193a1a03). The same dash-row ancestor (5441efb6193a1a03 at depth 16) also appears in the vpc winner seed 143a446d794db4ae chain, corroborating I2S contribution for both decisive pairs.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness that gates the true branch on a four-char colorspace-signature equality where cmplog/vpc still fail to flip 'RGB '/'XYZ ' to 'Lab ' more often than naive/value_profile, showing the magic-tag substitution is not what resolves the branch.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact in-program comparison that AllocEmptyTransform/profile-parse performs on the 'Lab ' tag is inferred from the colorspace bytes and source context, not directly observed as a logged CMP operand.
